name.description: Name of the database project to generate
name.x-prompt: What name would you like your database project to have? i.e: MyDb

directory.description: The directory to store the application in.
directory.x-prompt: Which directory do you want to create the project in?

service.x-prompt: Which database service would you like to use?

engine.description: Database engine to use with the selected service.
engine.x-prompt: Which database engine would you like to use?

databaseUser.x-prompt: What database username would you like to use?

databaseName.x-prompt: What database name would you like to use?

ormFramework.description: ORM framework to use for the generated project.
ormFramework.x-prompt: Which ORM framework would you like to use?

iacProvider.description: The preferred IaC provider. By default this is inherited from your initial selection.
iacProvider.x-prompt: Which provider would you like to manage your infrastructure? (default: Inherit)
